all.critique:
Below are my observations and critiques based on the analysis provided:

1. Empty Question List Handling (Medium Severity)  
 • The analysis assumes that a set of questions is always generated by the VQG module. However, it does not address what happens if no questions are returned (e.g., an empty list).  
 • In the detect_sample method—specifically in the matching score calculation step—the division of correct votes by the total number of questions could lead to a division‐by‐zero error if no q
